title: anthemis montana subsp. linnaeana
intro: Anthemis montana subsp. linnaeana, also known as mountain chamomile or Roman chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis montana plant, a flowering perennial native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Anthemis montana subsp. linnaeana include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or oil, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote a good night's sleep and alleviate symptoms of stress and anxiety.
